title: Reconcile BUR-2026-001 lifecycle mismatch
goal: Decide and apply the correct resolution for the completed initiative BUR-2026-001 that still carries planned tasks T006 and T009: verify them, re-home them into an active initiative, or reopen the initiative explicitly, so lifecycle stops recommending reopen-required.

acceptance.assertion: bureau lifecycle reports consistent=true for BUR-2026-001.
The chosen resolution (verify, re-home, or reopen) is recorded with rationale in the audit report or a follow-up note.

metadata.audit_finding: doctor reports reopen-required for BUR-2026-001 because T006/T009 are planned
